title: What is Google Cloud Marketplace
full_text:
What is Google Cloud Marketplace | Google Cloud
Specialized business and industry agents arrive in Gemini Enterprise. Read the announcement.
Google Cloud Marketplace
Discover thousands of industry-leading AI agents, software, and solutions validated by Google Cloud. Find professional services from qualified providers. Get trusted tech fast while optimizing cloud spend.
Find AI agents
Explore all solutions
4:56
What is Google Cloud Marketplace?
Google Cloud Marketplace offers a universal catalog of solutions from Google and our partner ecosystem for customers to easily discover, try, buy, and use.
Discover industry-leading technology
Easily browse our catalog of validated AI agents, software, and services that have undergone validation to integrate with your Google Cloud environment, including Gemini Enterprise.
Simplify procurement
Eliminate long procurement cycles and accelerate vendor reviews with flexible payment and fulfillment options from trusted technology vendors and channel partners.
Optimize your cloud spend
Get the most out of your cloud investment. Qualifying purchases of third-party Google Cloud Marketplace solutions can draw down on your Google Cloud commitments.
Streamline deployment
Accelerate time-to-value with streamlined deployment options for AI agents, SaaS, APIs, VM products, Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) apps, AI models, datasets, and more.
Maintain governance
Leverage a comprehensive governance toolkit to manage user access , create a curated Private Marketplace of approved products, and allow teams to safely request products be made available for use.
Consolidate billing
Integrated cost reporting in Google Cloud Console allows you to maintain visibility over your Google Cloud and third-party Google Cloud Marketplace spend.
A smarter way to find, try, buy, and use tech
Get Google Cloud credits when purchasing eligible Google Cloud Marketplace solutions for the first time.
See Marketplace Customer Credit Program
Looking for composable, pre-integrated solutions from systems integrators and software vendors?
Explore Industry Solutions (iVN)
What's new with Google Cloud Marketplace
Google named a Leader in the 2025 IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Hyperscaler Marketplaces.
Get the excerpt
Discover pre-vetted AI agents that run on Agent2Agent protocol and Gemini Enterprise.
Learn more
Watch how AI agents from the Cloud Marketplace ecosystem are being put into action and delivering value.
Get the video series
Elastic, Google Cloud, and Omdia experts share practical insights about how to develop an effective AI agent strategy.
Watch on-demand
Customer success stories
Case study

5 minute read

45 seconds
See all customers
Transacting through the marketplace solves a bunch of customer pain points. Centralization of IT purchasing and budgeting decisions is obviously easier.
Shaun Clowes, Chief Product Officer, Confluent
Watch the videos

Explore thousands of industry-leading solutions on Google Cloud Marketplace that have undergone technical validation to enable seamless integration with your Google Cloud environment.
